2069969230519480598.full_text:
Indian pacer Akash Deep tied the knot with Akshita in Banaras yesterday, and a hilarious incident from the wedding is now winning the internet.

A guest at the wedding curiously asked the groom, "Why didn't you invite Virat Kohli, MS Dhoni, or Rohit Sharma to the function?"

Akash Deep gave a witty, savage reply that left everyone in splits: "If I had invited them, do you really think my wedding could have happened peacefully here in Banaras?" 😂
